brand.name: Afframe
brand.tagline: A calmer place to manage accounting. Now with agents.

aside.headline: A calmer place to manage accounting. Now with agents.
aside.subtitle: {brand} brings documents, postings, and reports into one workspace where accountants and AI agents can work together.

quote.text: Afframe replaced five tools and gave us back our Friday nights. Our team finally has time to advise clients, not chase receipts.
quote.author: Lukáš Krejčí

email.title: Sign in to {brand}
email.description: Enter your work email to continue.
email.label: Work email
email.contactSalesPrompt: Looking to get started with {brand} for your business?

password.title: Enter your password
password.description: Enter your password to continue to {brand}.
password.label: Password
password.magicLinkSentDescription: We sent a sign-in link to {email}. Open it on this device to continue.

mfa.title: Two-factor verification
mfa.description: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app for {email}.
mfa.label: Verification code
mfa.recoveryDescription: Enter one of the recovery codes you saved when you turned on two-factor for {email}.

magicLink.label: Sign in with a magic link

password.title: Set up two-factor authentication
password.description: Confirm your password to begin enrolling an authenticator app.
password.label: Current password
password.errorMissingUri: Server did not return a TOTP URI. Try again.
password.errorMissingBackup: The server did not return backup codes. Two-factor cannot be enabled without recovery codes.

verify.title: Scan with your authenticator app
verify.description: Use Google Authenticator, 1Password, Authy, or any TOTP app to scan the code, then enter the 6-digit code it generates.
verify.step1Description: Scan with your authenticator app, or tap the code to copy the setup URI to your clipboard.
verify.step2Description: Open your authenticator app and enter the 6-digit code it shows for {brand}.
verify.secretHint: Can't scan? Add this secret to your authenticator app manually.
verify.label: 6-digit code

backup.title: Save your backup codes
backup.description: These codes let you sign in if you lose your authenticator app. Each one works once. Store them in a password manager or print them — they will not be shown again.
backup.acknowledge: I have saved these backup codes somewhere safe. I understand they will not be shown again.
backup.errorNotAcknowledged: Confirm you saved your backup codes before continuing.

forgot.title: Forgot your password?
forgot.description: We'll send a reset link to your email if an account exists.
forgot.label: Work email

sent.title: Check your email
sent.description: If an account exists for {email}, a password-reset link is on the way.

reset.title: Set a new password
reset.description: Choose a strong password of at least 12 characters.

invalidLink.title: Invalid link
invalidLink.description: This reset link is missing its token. Request a new one from the forgot-password page.

success.title: Password updated
success.description: Your password has been reset. You can now sign in with your new password.

errors.no-workspace-access: You are signed in but no workspace is linked to this account. Ask support for an invitation.
errors.signup-email-mismatch: Your signup invitation is for a different email than the account you're signed in as. Sign out and re-open the invite link.
errors.signup-session-expired: Your signup link expired. Ask support for a new invitation.
errors.invite-session-expired: Your invite link expired. Ask the inviter to resend it.
errors.missing-signup-token: The signup link is missing its token.
errors.missing-invite-token: The invite link is missing its token.
errors.expired: Your link has expired. Request a new one.
errors.invalid: Your link is invalid or has been tampered with.
errors.wrong_kind: Your link is the wrong type for this flow.
errors.disabled: This flow is currently disabled. Contact support.
errors.emailAlreadyRegistered: An account with this email already exists. Sign in with your existing password instead.
errors.invalidCode: That code didn't match. Try again.
errors.loginSessionExpired: Your sign-in session expired. Please start over.
errors.resetSent: If an account exists, a reset link is on the way.
errors.couldNotSendReset: Could not send the reset email. Try again in a moment.

invites.tooMany: You can invite up to 50 people at once.

welcome.title: You're in. Let's get to work.
welcome.description: Confirm your invitation, issued by {brand} support and valid for 7 days.

mismatch.title: You're signed in as someone else
mismatch.description: You're signed in as {sessionEmail}. This signup link was issued for {claimEmail}.
mismatch.instruction: Sign out to continue with this signup link.

welcome.title: You've been invited
welcome.description: Join the team on {brand} and pick up where everyone else left off.
welcome.signInExisting: Sign in to an existing account
welcome.footnote: By accepting, you agree to {brand}'s Terms and Privacy Policy. Invitation expires in 7 days.

mismatch.title: You're signed in as someone else
mismatch.description: You're signed in as {sessionEmail}. This invite link was issued for {claimEmail}.
mismatch.instruction: Sign out to continue with this invite link.

profile.title: Tell us who you are
profile.description: We use this to personalize {brand} and how teammates see you.
profile.avatarWrongType: Use a PNG or JPG image.
profile.phoneHint: Used for account recovery and security alerts.

experience.title: How familiar are you with accounting?
experience.description: We'll tune the experience to your level. You can change this later.

bookkeeper.title: Bookkeeper
bookkeeper.description: I work with books day to day.

password.title: Choose a password
password.description: Pick a strong password of at least 12 characters. You'll use this with {email} to sign in.

workspace.title: Set up your workspace
workspace.description: A workspace is the home for your team and clients in {brand}.

plan.title: Pick a plan
plan.description: You can change plans anytime. No card required during beta.

team.title: Invite your team
team.description: Add people who'll work with you. You can always invite more later.
team.note: Invites are saved as drafts and sent when you first add an organization.

toast.sentTitle: {count, plural, one {# invite sent} other {# invites sent}}
toast.sentDescription: If you don't see the email, the dev console transport prints links to your terminal — or visit /api/dev/outbox.
toast.failedTitle: {count, plural, one {# invite failed} other {# invites failed}}
toast.failedDescription: Check the dev-server log for the underlying error.

done.title: You're all set
done.description: Your workspace is ready. Here's what's next.

nextSteps.title: Next steps
nextSteps.addOrgDescription: Set up a client book or your own business.
nextSteps.exploreAgentsDescription: See how agents can take routine work off your plate.

errors.sessionExpired: Your onboarding session expired. Sign in to continue.
errors.savePlanFailed: Could not save your plan choice.
errors.persistOnboardingFailed: Could not finish setting up your account.
errors.uploadAvatarFailed: Could not upload your profile photo.
errors.noActiveWorkspace: We couldn't find your workspace. Sign in again to continue.
errors.emailAlreadyRegistered: An account with this email already exists. Sign in with your existing password instead.
errors.inviteEmailMismatch: This invitation is addressed to a different email. Sign out and open the link again with the invited address.

quote.text: If nobody is complaining, either everything works or the notification system doesn't.
quote.author: Source

password.description: Enter your password to continue to {brand} Admin.
